instructions.evidence: Point of view 6/10 — Has a mild POV (rentals > hotels, book essentials ahead) but mostly surveys options evenly.

patch.target: Waikiki: easy for first-timers, steps to food and main beaches. Ala Moana: better value, easier for relaxed group hangouts. Kailua: only practical if you get a rental; ideal for groups set on kayaking/beach mornings.
patch.before: Waikiki: easy for first-timers, steps to food and main beaches. Ala Moana: better value, easier for relaxed group hangouts. Kailua: only practical if you get a rental; ideal for groups set on kayaking/beach mornings.
patch.after: Skip Waikiki unless it's your first Hawaii trip—Ala Moana rentals win on every axis except being able to stumble to the beach drunk.
patch.rationale: Humanization axis "Point of view" scored 6/10: Has a mild POV (rentals > hotels, book essentials ahead) but mostly surveys options evenly.

instructions.evidence: Quotable sentence 5/10 — 'Herding cats and actually get everyone out of the chat and onto the sand' is quotable; most of the rest is forgettable.

patch.before: Oahu’s seasonal swings are real, pick wrong, and half the group’s whingeing.
patch.after: Pick the wrong month and half the group is whingeing by Tuesday while the other half is sunburned in the wrong places.
